item.title: 7-Drawer Dressers Recalled Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Tip-Over and Entrapment Hazards; Violate Mandatory Standard for Clothing Storage Units; Sold on Amazon.com by Hasuit Direct
item.company: Online at Amazon.com from September 2023 through May 2026 for about $160.
item.brand: Online at Amazon.com from September 2023 through May 2026 for about $160.
item.summary: This recall involves Hasuit 7-Drawer Dressers. The recalled dressers have seven drawers, are made of wood and come in black. They are 27.6 inches wide, 44.5 inches tall, 15.8 inches long and weigh 102 pounds. SKU: AJ-DJ502571_1" is printed on the products packaging (box).
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the recalled dressers immediately if they are not anchored to the wall and place them in an area that children cannot access. Consumers will be asked to pull out all seven drawers for destruction and write on the cabinet in permanent marker the word "RECALLED," take a photo of the cabinet and drawers and then email the photo to hasuitrecall@outlook.com. Consumers should then dispose of the recalled product.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
